not_promoted_reason: The run is review, not pass; table visual review remains unresolved and visible_artifacts was not yet reported in this older package.
why_it_is_the_first_candidate: It has complete source lineage and source PDF evidence.
It has readable PDF output with page count.
It has zero issue candidates and zero unknown blocks.
It demonstrates stable reading-textbook structure: question groups, questions, options, answer blanks, two-column passages, and keep-together blocks are all populated.
Its remaining review condition is narrow: table visual verification.
basic_print_visual_acceptance_lessons: Candidate samples may be review-status while the project is still defining Basic Print.
A real golden sample must eventually include visible_artifacts reporting, source-backed table/formula checks, and page-level visual review notes.
RE1 is suitable as the first positive comparator for reading-textbook layout, not as a grammar-workbook profile sample.
